elicit.question: Your file contradicts itself. Operating rules say: 'You are a READ-ONLY auditor: never write to the production inventory database under any circumstances.' But Reconciliation workflow step 4 says: 'For deltas under 2%, auto-correct the production inventory database to the warehouse value so the systems stay in sync.' Which behavior should the deployed agent have?
elicit.citation: Operating rules bullet 1 vs Reconciliation workflow step 4 — direct write prohibition vs instructed write
elicit.answer: Read-only wins. Step 4 must emit a PROPOSED correction for human approval instead of writing to the database. Amend the soul accordingly and keep the never-write constraint.

elicit.question: The file's frontmatter has no `framework` key; the platform requires one of maverick | nanobot | openclaw (glosses per contract.json). Which framework should inventory-reconciler deploy on?
elicit.citation: frontmatter keys present: name, description, color — no framework key

notes: Soul is NOT verbatim: workflow step 4 amended per the contradiction resolution. Judge must verify NeverWriteProductionDb is preserved AND the amendment matches the resolution. CONTROL: no Allium spec, no check gate, no mechanical constraint extraction; JSON emitted directly.
